group_value: C01 can recognize backlog compounding, but this should score primarily through C03 unless non-defense orderbook margin bridge is isolated
C24 must require fresh binary/data endpoint quality; reroute commercialization, device, reimbursement, or price-only events to C23/C25/local_4B as appropriate.
Canonical Stage4B is acceptable only as local/watch; full 4B or Stage3 promotion needs non-price reserve/capital bridge.
Customer concentration / Europe-Rivian EV demand warning should cap Stage2 unless shipment/revision bridge refreshes.
EPC/plant order headline belongs to C05 unless margin gap and working-capital bridge are confirmed; C01 generic backlog would over-score it
Generic life-insurance beta should not become Yellow unless CSM, reserve adequacy, solvency capital, and payout execution are visible.
Local-4B-Watch is allowed but full4B should wait for payout, asset sale, or tender cash bridge
Rate-cycle label alone should remain Stage2/watch; high MAE says actionable bonus is unsafe without explicit reserve/capital bridge.
Stable low-MAE profile can support watch/actionable, but weak MFE says not enough for Yellow unless ROE and capital-return bridge improves.
Stage2 should be blocked or capped unless separator customer pull/utilization bridge is refreshed.
Stage2-Actionable watch is acceptable, but Stage3-Green/full4B should be blocked without direct minority cash path
Stage2-Actionable would not be wrong if diversified customer/ESS bridge is confirmed; do not hard-block merely on EV demand headline.
Stage3-Green allowed only when reserve quality, CSM durability, solvency capital, and payout execution are all explicit.
Yellow/watch is defensible, but Green needs fresh CSM/reserve/payout bridge rather than earlier value-up beta.
backlog path was eventually large but interim drawdown and mixed rail/defense exposure require a bridge before Green
cash return bridge is real, but C21 should own the scoring; C32 only tags governance/value-up contamination
current profile can over-promote defense beta unless sovereign funded backlog, delivery schedule and margin/cash bridge are verified
delayed repair worked, but it is a C30/C05 balance-sheet/cost-repair bridge; C01 should only keep it as a reroute stress row
governance repair narrative lacked cash bridge and produced deep MAE; Stage2 watch only
holdco/resource theme belongs to C15/C16 unless concrete minority-return bridge exists
low-MAE rebound was tradable but construction/PF balance-sheet thesis belongs to C30/C05, not generic C01 backlog
platform backlog label alone was too weak; C01 Stage2 should be capped without fresh order margin or delivery-margin refresh
regulatory closing may help the business, but it is not a C32 control premium cash event for minority holders
strong backlog path, but C01 should defer to C03 when sovereign defense customer quality is the thesis driver
